title: Natural Disasters
description:
A Weather themed Modpack

Focused on Tornadoes and
Other Disasters
body:
This is a realistic modpack that includes natural disasters like tornadoes and tsunami
and also with immersive weather, bringing a unique experience for users that want to play a realistic gameplay in minecraft.

![Immersive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f0972a34cfe26da08ea83d5c0fd6204d5adc96f.png)

Normal Version:

Requirements:

Recommended           Minimum:
                         
RTX 1060ti            Intel Integrated Card                        
i5 5500 or above      i3 4500
Enough space for MC    ENOUGH SPACE!!!!!!

If your pc can't run Minecraft at all, you should use instead the
Low End Version:

Not Yet.

![Natural Disasters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65036bbf702d6bd7aa3e0fc51d3c1294399cddb6.png)
